findings.title: Large expense review
findings.supplier_name: QuickBuild Technical Services Sp. z o.o.
findings.subject: QuickBuild Technical Services Sp. z o.o.
findings.detected_signal: Expense GE-002 amount 24000.00 PLN meets or exceeds the large expense threshold 10000.00.
findings.why_it_matters: Large expenses require stronger documentation, budget justification, and reviewer traceability.
findings.reviewer_question: Is this large expense supported by contract, invoice, activity evidence, and budget justification?
findings.next_action: Review supporting documents before accepting the expense.

rule_trace.human_readable_rule: A large grant expense requires human review when the amount is material enough to warrant additional budget, activity, supplier, and documentation checks.
rule_trace.verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only and does not create a donor compliance verdict, fraud finding, legal conclusion, payment block, supplier sanction, or autonomous enforcement action.

normative_trace.verdict_boundary: LEO identifies potentially relevant normative references and review requirements only. LEO does not issue legal conclusions, donor compliance conclusions, payment decisions, supplier sanctions, or enforcement conclusions.

findings.title: Cash reimbursement documentation review
findings.subject: MedPaper Logistics Sp. z o.o.
findings.detected_signal: Expense GE-005 uses cash reimbursement with document_status 'partial'. Budget line cash permission: True.
findings.why_it_matters: Cash reimbursement requires stronger documentation discipline because it is harder to trace than direct bank transfer.
findings.reviewer_question: Is the reimbursement supported by complete participant, recipient, or payment documentation?
findings.next_action: Review reimbursement documentation before accepting the expense.

rule_trace.human_readable_rule: A cash reimbursement requires human review when supporting documentation, activity linkage, or reimbursement justification must be checked before audit packaging.
rule_trace.verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only and does not create a donor compliance verdict, fraud finding, legal conclusion, payment block, supplier sanction, or autonomous enforcement action.

normative_trace.verdict_boundary: LEO identifies potentially relevant normative references and review requirements only. LEO does not issue legal conclusions, donor compliance conclusions, payment decisions, supplier sanctions, or enforcement conclusions.

findings.title: Budget line category mismatch
findings.supplier_name: ClearMed Equipment Group Sp. z o.o.
findings.subject: ClearMed Equipment Group Sp. z o.o.
findings.detected_signal: Expense category 'medical_equipment' is not listed as allowed under budget line BL-002 (IT equipment and digital infrastructure).
findings.why_it_matters: The expense category does not match the allowed categories for the selected budget line. This may be explainable, but it requires budget and donor reporting review.
findings.reviewer_question: Is this expense category allowed under the selected budget line, or should the expense be reclassified or justified?
findings.next_action: Escalate for human review of budget line mapping before accepting the expense.

rule_trace.source_rule_name: Budget Line Category Mismatch Review Rule
rule_trace.human_readable_rule: A grant expense requires human review when its recorded expense category does not align with the referenced budget line category.
rule_trace.verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only and does not create a donor compliance verdict, fraud finding, legal conclusion, payment block, supplier sanction, or autonomous enforcement action.

normative_trace.verdict_boundary: LEO identifies potentially relevant normative references and review requirements only. LEO does not issue legal conclusions, donor compliance conclusions, payment decisions, supplier sanctions, or enforcement conclusions.

findings.title: Missing activity reference
findings.subject: FreshStart Consulting Sp. z o.o.
findings.detected_signal: Expense GE-008 has no activity_reference, but its budget line requires a link to an activity or output.
findings.why_it_matters: A missing activity reference weakens the connection between the expense and the reported grant activity.
findings.reviewer_question: Which project activity, output, or deliverable does this expense support?
findings.next_action: Request activity or output reference before accepting the expense for reporting.

rule_trace.human_readable_rule: A grant expense requires human review when it lacks an activity reference needed to connect the cost to a project activity, output, or implementation record.

findings.title: Missing required contract
findings.subject: GreenLeaf Catering Sp. z o.o.
findings.detected_signal: Expense GE-009 has no contract_id, but contract evidence is expected for category 'event_catering'.
findings.why_it_matters: Contracted services or travel-related expenses require authorization evidence to support grant reporting traceability.
findings.reviewer_question: Is there a contract or equivalent authorization for this expense?
findings.next_action: Request contract or equivalent authorization evidence before accepting the expense.

findings.title: Unknown supplier reference
findings.supplier_name: Unknown Local Supplier Sp. z o.o.
findings.subject: Unknown Local Supplier Sp. z o.o.
findings.detected_signal: Expense GE-011 references supplier_id SUP-008, but no supplier profile exists in the grant review dataset.
findings.why_it_matters: The expense supplier is not present in the supplier reference file. The reviewer should verify identity, role, and suitability before accepting the expense trail.
findings.reviewer_question: Does this supplier have verified identity, role, and documentation for the grant-funded activity?
findings.next_action: Request supplier profile or supporting identity documentation before accepting this expense.

findings.supplier_name: Unknown Local Supplier Sp. z o.o.
findings.subject: Unknown Local Supplier Sp. z o.o.
findings.detected_signal: Expense GE-011 was recorded 6 day(s) before reporting period close (2026-03-31).
findings.why_it_matters: Expenses recorded close to the reporting deadline may be legitimate, but they require complete documentation and timing justification.
findings.reviewer_question: Was this expense submitted near the reporting deadline for a documented operational reason?
findings.next_action: Review timing, documentation completeness, and reporting justification.

findings.title: Repeated round-value expenses
findings.subject: FreshStart Consulting Sp. z o.o.
findings.detected_signal: 2 round-value expenses were detected for supplier SUP-003, category 'consulting', period 2026-Q1. Total amount: 28000.00 PLN
findings.why_it_matters: Repeated round-value expenses may be legitimate, but they can also indicate weak cost breakdown or repeated advances requiring documentation review.
findings.reviewer_question: Are repeated round-value expenses supported by real cost breakdowns and activity evidence?
findings.next_action: Review the grouped expenses together instead of treating them as isolated rows.

rule_trace.human_readable_rule: Grant expenses require human review when repeated round-value amounts create a pattern that may need explanation, supporting documentation, or budget-owner confirmation.
